transcript:
CALLER: Haan, hello. Mujhe pulmonologist se milna hai, mujhe khansi 3 hafte se hai, antibiotics se kuch farak nahin pada.
AGENT: Ji Mr...?
CALLER: Omkar Thakur.
AGENT: Mr. Thakur, hamare pulmonologist Dr. Kedar Bhide hain. Unka slot parso yani mangalwar ko shaam 5 baje aur shukravaar subah 11 baje hai. Kaunsa theek rahega?
CALLER: Mangalvaar shaam theek rahega.
AGENT: Perfect. Mobile number?
CALLER: 9345678012.
AGENT: Confirm ho gaya. Mr. Omkar Thakur, Dr. Bhide ke saath mangalvaar shaam 5 baje. Agar pehle koi X-ray ya CT scan karaya ho toh wo bhi saath leke aayein.
CALLER: Haan, chest X-ray hai mere paas. Lekar aaunga.
AGENT: Bahut achha. Jaldi theek ho jaayein!
